title: MBTI별 남녀가 이별을 결심한 순간 [SOM]
text: I would just give him a chance by saying "I think we are in the stage of boredom" You gotta show me some love, or let's end this relationship! Moment I decide to break up I get bored really easily. If she acts the same every day, I would lose my interest. Her emotions, and everything counts. I just want every day to be different. When he changed. When he got out of that 'fall in love' stage. When she starts to put me in a cage. "Where are you? Whatcha doing? When are you coming? When's it over? Call me when it's done" When it feels like a waste of time. When I feel like I could have done something else at home rather than this. When I'm out of patience, and our love for each other falls apart. When he tries to gets both of the fried chicken legs. He keeps trying to do something with me. He can't leave me alone. I need some privacy! When each other cares less? When my love for her fades. I'm also tired from walking during the date, and she just starts whining because her legs hurt. When he does something which I already said that I hate. When she doesn't admit her mistake and never apologizes. When he just comes 5 minutes late every single time. When she was a strong lady, but tries to follow my pace? Words and actions when breaking up Let's break up. We shouldn't go more, and fight in front of the public, so let's just end here. I would talk about ending the relationship very long to make that memory also good. I would definitely go face to face, and just say, "We're done" I try to act cool. "Oh, I guess we couldn't go further, well, too bad for us!" "Bye!" and cry in the corner. I usually just said bye without a deep talk, but I would like to do the opposite now. I would just give him a chance by just saying "I think we are in the stage of boredom" You gotta show me some love, or let's end this relationship! I just can't say 'let's break up' by myself, so I just make him say it by acting rude. I can't hide my boredom from my face. I show the boredom on my face on purpose before breakup. I wouldn't take back my words unless he is really desperate, kneeling down and hugging my foot or something. I'm a mellow guy, so I say 'let's break up' and I also cry. Crying is one thing, but I also do a drunk

title: MBTI별 남녀가 이별을 결심한 순간 [SOM]
text: e on purpose before breakup. I wouldn't take back my words unless he is really desperate, kneeling down and hugging my foot or something. I'm a mellow guy, so I say 'let's break up' and I also cry. Crying is one thing, but I also do a drunk call. Me after breaking up Just act like normal, but I suddenly get sad and a drop of tear falls. Why am I... yeah that's a personal experience. I just cried like those girls in drama series while I was on the bus to home. It's quite a spectacle. I just cried my way home by foot, and that distance was like a taxi distance. As I look at the river, I say, "I always loved ya!!!!!!!!" I just need some shoulders, so I call my friends to drink, and then I start crying out loud. Unmute him and check if he said something, but delete the search history, delete Instagram stories. I just cut all relationships with him. I just get the fact "We're done", and I feel nothing even if I get a picture of two of us, and just think of it as nothing. I actually save all those memories. Those are all saved on my NAVER Drive. Memories are still part of me, so.. Watch a movie. Call my friend and drink like there's no tomorrow. Never stop calling him back until I think it's really over and always drunk in those times. Crying, whining and stuff. Drinking are my primary solution, I guess I would look for another guy to be with?
